item.title: After Work, Mom Made Lunch
item.description: A simple job site moment after a hard day of concrete work, followed by lunch made by mom.

item.title: Spotting a Dip in the Concrete
item.description: A quick look at a concrete dip on the job site and how crews identify issues before moving forward.
